title: Al-Rukniyah Madrasa
summary: Al-Rukniyah Madrasa (Arabic: الْمَدْرَسَة الرُّكْنِيَّة, romanized: al-Madrasah ar-Ruknīyah)  is a 13th-century madrasa located in Damascus, Syria.
text: Al-Rukniyah Madrasa (Arabic: الْمَدْرَسَة الرُّكْنِيَّة, romanized: al-Madrasah ar-Ruknīyah)  is a 13th-century madrasa located in Damascus, Syria.
